user_message: Can you pull the context on Alpine Ski House? I need to build the narrative.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-03 16:09 EST
Subject: competitive positioning - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with competitive positioning. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-08 17:37 EST
Subject: URGENT: competitive positioning Issue at Alpine Ski House

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-15 11:55 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about competitive positioning. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Alpine Ski House
Date: 2024-02-28
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), Michelle (Alpine Ski House)

[00:02:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on competitive positioning from our last session.

[00:07:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on data residency and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:10:00] Michelle (Alpine Ski House): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about data residency. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:18:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:20:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): On the competitive positioning front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.
